rows.label: tev036201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev036201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Quiquat about her work.

rows.label: tev036201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev036201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Quiquat about recent developments.

rows.label: tev036201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Quiquat about the Ma-non ship.

rows.label: tev036201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Quiquat about Ma-non technology.

rows.label: tev036201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Quiquat about recent developments.

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0001
rows.name:
I've never seen a city with more unfinished
projects, have you? You're lucky we came along
with some elegant technical solutions, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0002
rows.name:
We're providing all sorts of things,
but explaining all the details makes
me kind of tired, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0003
rows.name:
Quince especially has trouble following
along sometimes, so we have to come up with
a way to help her understand, don't we?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0008
rows.name: Do you know a human named Boze Rose?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0009
rows.name:
All he does is yell, "KAAATSUUUUUU!"
...Which is quite odd, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Anyway, he seems to be going through a
rough spot at the the moment, I think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0011
rows.name:
He should file his problems
with Quest Board, right? It's
so so so much easier that way![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Quince took refuge on our ship, so I
taught her how the engine works, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0021
rows.name:
She nodded like she understood
it all, but I actually think
it flew right over her head?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0022
rows.name:
At this point, I'm thinking I may need
to pipe data into her brain directly...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Heh. Just kidding, okay? Quince
would never agree to something
like that, would she?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Hey, did you hear? It sounds like
the nominal leader of this this
ship is eager to work really hard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0031
rows.name:
I wonder if all the work you BLADEs
did maybe inspired him or something?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0032
rows.name: I know THAT feeling, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0033
rows.name:
I mean, look at Quince, okay? If I don't intervene,
she's likely to snap an arm off or something.
I've never seen such clumsy work, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0038
rows.name:
So when are you getting your real
bodies back? Today? Perhaps tomorrow?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0039
rows.name:
...Oh, so it will be a
while still? Good good.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0040
rows.name:
The only hope of getting Quince to remember
ANYTHING about our technology is to transfer
data directly into her brain, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0041
rows.name:
And I can't do that with a fleshy brain, but
it's quick and painless with a Blue Blood,
you know? ...Er, do you want to to try it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0050
rows.name:
You know what would be nice to
have? Some light-speed jet fins.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0051
rows.name:
If I had those, I could apply the same gravity control
system we use in our ship to float cargo anywhere it
needs to go, couldn't I? Think of the time we'd save![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0052
rows.name:
The only problem is that you need to target an
aetrygon's main body or its back to collect the
fin, right? And aetrygons are tough enough as it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036201_MSG0053
rows.name:
Anyway, they're hard items to come by, but if you
know any BLADEs heading to White Woods, do a Ma-non
a favor and ask them to to bring some back, okay?[ST:wait ]
